title: Government response to the Royal Commission on Environmental Pollution's twenty-fifth report
body: "This document contains the following information: The U.K. Government response to the Royal Commission on Environmental Pollution’s twenty-fifth report: turning the tide - addressing the impact of fisheries on the marine environment.  Government response to the 25th report of the Royal Commission on Environmental Pollution, Cm 6392 (ISBN 0101639228).  This Command Paper was laid before Parliament by a Government Minister by Command of Her Majesty. Command Papers are considered by the Government to be of interest to Parliament but are not required to be presented by legislation. "
